name: Cottage Cheese Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 Pkg. frozen chopped spinach (10 oz.), thawed and drained
1 Can refrigerated crescent dinner rolls (8 oz.)
1 C. small curd cottage cheese (8 oz.)
4 Slices bacon, crisp cooked, drained and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the spinach well. Press out excess water and roll it in a clean towel to wring firmly.
2. In a medium bowl, beat together eggs, spinach, cottage cheese, and onion until well blended. Set aside.
3. Separate the dinner roll dough into 4 rectangles. Press to seal diagonal perforations.
4. Place the rectangles in a lightly greased 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish or pan.
5. Press the rectangles together to form a crust extending up the sides of the dish.
6. Reserve seven mushroom slices for garnish. Sprinkle the remaining mushrooms, Mozzarella cheese, and bacon on the bottom of the crust.
7. Pour the reserved egg mixture over the toppings.
8. Bake the quiche in a preheated 375°F oven for 15 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and arrange the reserved mushroom slices in a circle on top of the quiche.
10. Return the quiche to the oven and continue baking until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean, about 15 to 20 minutes.
